subcodes.first_line: In this day the heaven of grace is uplifted, the ocean of bounty is surging, and the rays of the Sun of loving-kindness have encompassed all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز سماء کرم مرتفع و بحر جود مواج و پرتو آفتاب عنایت جمیع اشیا را اخذ
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
